title: Israel strikes Mahshahr — JPost: IDF video shows strikes, 'unique materials critical for ballistic missile program'
snippet: Jerusalem Post reports with IDF-released video footage of strikes on Mahshahr petrochemical complex. IDF states the facility produced 'unique materials critical for Iran's ballistic missile program.' Video shows multiple strikes on complex and air defense positions.
tag_reason: Same story as src-1652 (Israel Mahshahr strike) — JPost coverage adds IDF video detail
